strategist.title: The Strategist
strategist.description: Logical, disciplined, and consistent. You plan before you act and believe in long-term growth.

creative.title: The Creative
creative.description: You think visually and emotionally. You bring color, ideas, and originality to the house.

builder.title: The Builder
builder.description: You love execution. You turn ideas into reality through technology and action.

connector.title: The Connector
connector.description: People matter to you. You connect, support, and strengthen the community.
